name: Apple Raspberry Streusel Pie
recipeInstructions:
Prepare pie crust according to package directions for a filled one-crust pie, using a 9-inch pie pan. Refrigerate remaining crust for later use. Preheat oven to 375°F.
In a medium bowl, toss apples with lemon juice. Set aside.
In a large saucepan, combine sugar, cornstarch, and cinnamon. Stir in the raspberry liquid. Cook over medium heat until the mixture thickens, stirring constantly. Remove from heat; fold in drained raspberries and apples. Pour into prepared pie crust-lined pan.
Lightly spoon flour into measuring cup; level off. In a medium bowl, combine all topping ingredients to form crumbs. Sprinkle over fruit mixture. Bake at 375°F for 40-50 minutes or until crust is golden brown. Cover edge of pie crust with strips of foil after 15-20 minutes of baking to prevent excessive browning. Cool. (Makes 8 servings)
